name: Farmers Fleet
statement: An event-driven logistics system deployed via Infrastructure as Code (IaC) on Google Kubernetes Engine. With three-portal ecosystem designed to connect farmers and fleet. Developed with a deploy script to provision Terraform, seed the database, and deploy to GKE clusters.

name: Store Locator with Discovery
statement: A cloud-native store locator with discovery features showing five nearest stores on the map from the user's starting point. Integrated Google Maps Platform APIs, and deployed via Docker, gcloud CLI, and Terraform modules.

name: SQL Data Warehouse Project
statement: In this project, I explored SQL and Data Warehousing by implementing the Medallion Architecture. I was keen to understand how businesses transform raw data into a structured system to drive business intelligence.

name: Sand and Gravel Ops
statement: A streamlined API for sand and gravel operations, designed to manage orders, track inventory, and monitor status. I integrated a PostgreSQL container via Docker and managed the database using the PostgreSQL extension. This project serves as a personal capstone following the Learn to Cloud curriculum.

name: Portfolio Website
statement: A compilation of cloud-based projects demonstrating technical proficiency and resilience as a self-taught engineer. Developed a Python and FastAPI backend with a Google Labs' Stitch-designed frontend, utilizing GitHub Actions for CI/CD to automate deployments to Cloud Run and hosting static assets in Cloud Storage.
